verses.text: Hih Stefen thahna thu-ah Saul in zong thukimpih hi.
Thu um mi pawlkhat in Stefen vui uh a, nakpi takin dahin a kap uh hi
Ahi zongin Saul in pawlpi suksiat ding hanciam a, inn khat pan inn khatah pai kawikawi-in, thu um numei leh pasalte kai-in thong sungah a khia hi.
Tua bangin a kithehthang mite pai kawikawi-in thu a hilh uh hi
Filip zong Samaria gam khuapi-ah pai-in Khrih thu a hilh hi
Mihonte in Filip' thugen leh a na lamdang bawlte a muh uh ciangin a thugen khempeuh limtakin a ngai uh hi
Mi tampite sung panin dawite nakpi takin kiko-in paikhia uh a, khutzaw khezaw mite zong kidamsak hi
Tua ahih manin tua khuapi sunga om mite lungdam mahmah uh hi
Tua khuasungah Simon a kici mi khat om a, amah mitphial bawl siampi hi a, Samaria mite in lamdangsa mahmah uh hi. Amah milian mahmah khatin kigen a
tua khuasunga om milian mineu a om khempeuh in a thu limtakin ngai-in, “Vang Lianpa,” a kici Pasian pen amah ahi hi, a ci uh hi
Amah in sauveipi sung mitphial bawl a, mite in lamdangsa mahmah uh ahih manin a thu a um uh hi
Ahi zongin Pasian' Ukna Lungdamna Thu leh Jesuh Khrih thu, Filip' gente a up uh ciangin, numei pasal a um khempeuh tui a kiphum uh hi
Simon mahmah in zong um a, tui a kiphum khit ciangin Filip zui tawntung a, lim leh na lamdang lianpipite a bawl a muh ciangin lamdang a sa mahmah hi
Samaria mite in Pasian' thu a san'khitna uh, Jerusalem-a om sawltakte in a zak uh ciangin amaute kiangah Peter leh Johan a paisak uh hi
Amaute a tun' uh ciangin tua lai-a om thu um mite in Kha Siangtho a ngahna dingun thu a ngetsak uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Topa Jesuh min tawh a kituiphum hi pan bek uh a, amaute khat beek in Kha Siangtho ngah nailo uh hi
Peter leh Johan in amaute lu tungah a khut uh a ngak khit uh ciangin Kha Siangtho a ngah uh hi
Sawltakte in amaute tungah a khut uh a ngak ciangin Kha Siangtho a ngahna uh mu ahih manin Simon in Peter leh Johan kiangah sum pia a
“Kei zong ka khut ka ngakna mi peuhpeuh in Kha Siangtho a ngahtheihna dingin hih bang vangliatna kei zong hong pia un,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin Peter in, “Pasian' piakkhong na pen sum tawh lei theih dingin ngaihsun na hih manin na sumteng tawh sikhawm in
Pasian in na lungsim man hong salo ahih manin kote' nasepna-ah nang nong kihel thei kei ding hi
Tua ahih manin na ngaihsut hoihlohna panin kisikkik in la, hih bang na ngaihsutna thu-ah na mawhna hong maisak theihna dingin Topa kiangah thu ngen in
Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in en'luatna lungsim nei-in, mawhna in hong valhcip mi khat na hih lamtak ka hong thei hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Simon in Peter leh Johan kiangah, “Tu-a na thugente uh kei tungah khat beek hong tun'lohna dingin thu hong ngetsak un,” a ci hi
Amaute in Jesuh Khrih thu a theihte uh genin Topa' thugente a hilh khit uh ciangin Jerusalem khua-ah a ciahkik uh hi. A ciahkik kawmun Samaria khuaneu lampite-ah Lungdamna Thu a hilh uh hi.
Topa' vantung mi khat in Filip kiangah, “Kithawi in la, Jerusalem khua panin Gaza khua paina lampi zuan dingin leitaw lam manawhin pai in,” a ci hi. (Tua lampi tu-in kizang pha nawnlo hi

Filip zong kithawi-in a pai hi. Lampi-ah Ethiopia mi mang lian khat tawh kituak hi. Tua mangpa pen Ethiopia kumpinu Kandeis khutnuai-a mang lian khat hi a, kumpinu neihsa khempeuh a ukpa ahi hi. Jerusalem khua-ah Pasian bia dingin a va pai hi a
inn zuan dingin leeng sungah a tuan' kawmin kamsang Isaiah laibu a sim hi
Tua laitakin Kha Siangtho in Filip kiangah, “Pai in la tua leeng mai-ah va om in,” ci-in a sawl hi
Filip zong ama kiangah va tai a, kamsang Isaiah laibu a simna za ahih manin, “Na laisim a khiatna na thei hiam?” ci-in a dong hi
Amah in, “Mi khatpeuh in hong hilhtel lohpi-in bangci theih ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in dawng a, ama leeng tungah Filip a tuang dingin a sam hi
Tua a sim Lai Siangtho mun pen, “A kigo dingin a kikai tuuno hamlo a, a mul a kimeetsak tuuno a hamloh mah bangin, amah kam khat beek paulo hi
Mite in amah simmawhbawl gawp a, amah a huh kuamah omlo hi. Ama nuntakna leitungah bei ahih manin, a suan a khakte' thu, ci-a gen ding omlo hi,” ci-in a kigelhna mun ahi hi
Tua ciangin mangpa in Filip kiangah, “Hih kamsangpa in amah a kicihna ahi hiam, tua ahih kei leh midang khatpeuh a cihna ahi hiam, hong gen dih in,” a ci hi
Filip zong a kam ka-in thugen ding kipan a, tua a Lai Siangtho simna mun-a kipanin Jesuh thu ciangdong a gen hi
Lampi-ah a pai laitakun tui omna mun tung uh a, mangpa in, “Hih lai-ah tui om hi. Tui kiphum nuam peuh leng kua'n hong kham thei ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Filip in, “Na lungsim takpi tawh na up nak leh tui na kiphum thei ding hi,” a cih ciangin, “Jesuh Khrih pen Pasian' Tapa hi, ci-in ka um hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin a leeng a khawlsakna dingin mangpa in thu pia a, Filip tawh a nihun tui phualah pai-in Filip in amah a tuiphum hi
Tui sung panin a paikhiat khit uh ciangin Topa' Kha Siangtho in Filip paikhiatpih hi. Mangpa in Filip mu nawnlo hi; ahi zongin lungdam takin a lampai a zom hi
Tua ciangin Filip pen Azotas khua-ah a om ahih lamtak amah kiphawk a, tua khua-a kipanin Sisaria khua a tun'dongin khua khempeuhah Lungdamna Thu a hilh hi.
